title: Unity Software Inc. (U) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text: Current Analyst Consensus: Unity Software has maintained Buy-rated status from a majority of analysts covering the stock. Key analyst views focus on the company's successful strategic transformation under CEO Matt Bromberg. Earnings Forecasts: For 2026, analysts forecast EPS of -$0.70 for the full year, with a range from -$0.96 to -$0.36. For 2027, analysts forecast EPS of -$0.26, with a range from -$0.62 to +$0.16. Revenue Forecasts: Analysts expect continued mid-double-digit revenue growth through 2026-2027, driven by Vector platform expansion and Create Solutions subscription growth. Valuation Metrics: Unity trades at a forward price-to-sales ratio of 7.04, which is elevated compared to historical averages but reflects investor confidence in the growth narrative. Recent Developments: Positive sentiment has been driven by Q1 2026 earnings beat, Vector platform momentum (49% YoY growth in Grow segment), and achievement of positive free cash flow ($66M in Q1). Risks: Analysts note execution risk on the path to GAAP profitability by Q4 2026, competitive pressure from other ad platforms, and potential macro headwinds in digital advertising.
